hero.bio: Hi, I'm Mustafa Mahmoud — a passionate Full Stack Developer (MERN) and JavaScript Instructor since 2023, building production-ready applications and mentoring the next generation of developers.
about.label: About Me
about.title: Who is
about.title.name: Mustafa Mahmoud
about.story.title: My Story
about.story.p1: I'm a Full Stack Developer and Technical Instructor specializing in the MERN Stack, with a focus on building production-ready web applications and empowering developers through hands-on education.
about.story.p2: My journey began in 2023 at Telecom Egypt, where I developed and optimized internal enterprise systems. In parallel, I stepped into education — first at Mansoura University's Faculty of Engineering, then at Delta Higher Institute, Codax Academy, and Acoad Academy, where I designed and delivered comprehensive JavaScript, React, and Node.js curricula.
about.story.p3: Through consistent quality and a practical teaching approach, I've trained 1000+ students, many of whom are now working software engineers — a result I take great pride in.
about.highlight1.title: Full Stack Developer
about.highlight1.desc: Specializing in MERN Stack — MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js
